title: decolua/9router
summary: 9router provides a unified routing layer for AI coding tools, enabling multi-provider access, fallback, and token optimization.
content:
9router provides a unified routing layer for AI coding tools, enabling multi-provider access, fallback, and token optimization.
Highlights:
- 5377 stars this week
- Supports 40+ providers
- Auto-fallback capability
- Token cost optimization
